data.body: FIXTURE-DRIVEN SEMANTIC TESTS (AC): added. G7 is an AGENT (LLM-judgment) criterion, so its semantics are validated by a gated eval — the SAME convention G3/G4 use (their semantics live in plan-review-container.eval.yaml, not tests/ unit tests, because the judgment is the model's). Added src/rebar/llm/eval_specs/plan-review-g7.eval.yaml with the three required fixture parent/leaf scenarios: G7-P-consistent-narrowing (expect: pass — a leaf that narrows its parent must NOT fire), G7-R-out-of-parent-scope (expect: finding — a leaf adding an out-of-parent-scope deliverable FIRES), G7-R-contradicts-parent-ac (expect: finding — a leaf contradicting a parent AC FIRES); plus a deterministic emits_valid_findings gate scorer + a cross-family llm-judge report. A deterministic tests/ test — tests/unit/test_plan_review_g7.py::test_g7_semantic_fixture_cases_cover_the_three_scenarios — loads the spec, asserts it validates ([] problems), and pins the three scenarios' expectations, so the fixtures are exercised in 'make test' too. BUILD ATTESTATION (execution-outcome ACs): on the current d4cf tree 2026-07-13 — make lint PASS (ruff clean; 943 files formatted); make typecheck PASS (mypy, 303 files); make test — the G7 suites pass (pytest tests/unit/test_plan_review_g7.py tests/unit/test_d4cf_g7_edge.py -> 20 passed) and the full suite was green in the stack pre-flight (5647 passed; 2 env-only failures outside this diff). Change 617 (d4cf) earned Gerrit Verified+MAX + LLM-Review+MAX on its pushed patchset.
